case_title: MARIJA MOZINA ET AL VS. MONIKA FISCHER BAYER

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2015 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,571.00 FILED BY MOZINA, MARIJA BOGICEVIC, BRANKO AS TO DEFENDANT BAYER, MONIKA FISCHER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOZINA, MARIJA BOGICEVIC, BRANKO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BAYER, MONIKA FISCHER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOGICEVIC, BRANKO
(SC-108) ANSWER TO REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT BAYER, MONIKA FISCHER
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $325.00 SERVED NOV-20-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BAYER, MONIKA FISCHER
PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED DECEMBER 11, 2015. GIVEN TO CLERK IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-18-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-18-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS WERE PRESENT THROUGH COURT CALL . DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. PLIANITFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
